Summary: Estimating Option-Implied Probability Distributions for Asset Pricing
Description: Forecasting the performance of an asset and quantifying the uncertainty associated with such a forecast is a difficult task: one that is frequently made more difficult by a shortage of observed market data. This example illustrates one approach for creating a price forecast based on option price data. This toolbox contains the code and examples for the technical article 'Estimating Option-Implied Probability Distributions for Asset Pricing'.
